message:
fix: auto-detect non-root on macOS and use user-scope launchd

- Add is_running_as_root() helper using nix::unistd::geteuid()
- Auto-escalate to user-scope launchd when not running as root
- Update scope display to show effective scope after auto-detection

Closes #1

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
